entry.title: Corona Virus: जानिए क्या है Delhi Model, जिसकी दुनिया भर में हो रही है चर्चा Boldsky

link.title: Corona Virus: जानिए क्या है Delhi Model, जिसकी दुनिया भर में हो रही है चर्चा Boldsky

entry.content:
In India also, the number of infected is increasing continuously, but now the condition of the capital of the country, ie Delhi, is improving rapidly. People are recovering quickly here. At the same time the number of infected is also decreasing. In such a situation, people are now curious to know what the government of Delhi has done that there has been a sharp decline in the cases of corona infection, whereas it was being called the ‘biggest corona hotspot’ of the country a few days ago. It has been named the ‘Delhi Model’. Let us know what is this ‘Delhi model’, which is now being discussed not only in the country but also abroad.
भारत में भी संक्रमितों की संख्या लगातार बढ़ती जा रही है, लेकिन अब देश की राजधानी यानी दिल्ली की हालत में तेजी से सुधार हो रहा है। यहां लोग जल्दी ठीक हो रहे हैं। साथ ही संक्रमितों की संख्या भी घटती जा रही है। ऐसे में अब लोग यह जानने को उत्सुक हो रहे हैं कि आखिर दिल्ली की सरकार ने ऐसा क्या किया कि कोरोना संक्रमण के मामलों में तेज गिरावट आ गई जबकि कुछ दिन पहले इसे देश का ‘सबसे बड़ा कोरोना हॉटस्पॉट’ कहा जा रहा था। इसे ‘दिल्ली मॉडल’ नाम दिया गया है। आइए जानते हैं कि आखिर क्या है ये ‘दिल्ली मॉडल’, जिसकी चर्चा अब देश ही नहीं बल्कि विदेशों में भी हो रही है।
#Delhimodel #Coronavirus #Arvindkejriwal
entry.summary: In India also, the number of infected is increasing continuously, but now the condition of the capital of the country, ie Delhi, is improving rapidly. People are recovering quickly here. At the same time the number of infected is also decreasing. In such a situation, people are now curious to know what the government of Delhi has done that there has been a sharp decline in the cases of corona infection, whereas it was being called the ‘biggest corona hotspot’ of the country a few days ago. It has been named the ‘Delhi Model’. Let us know what is this ‘Delhi model’, which is now being discussed not only in the country but also abroad. भारत में भी संक्रमितों की संख्या लगातार बढ़ती जा रही है, लेकिन अब देश की राजधानी यानी दिल्ली की हालत में तेजी से सुधार हो रहा है। यहां लोग जल्दी ठीक हो रहे हैं। साथ ही संक्रमितों की संख्या भी घटती जा रही है। ऐसे में अब लोग यह जानने को उत्सुक हो रहे हैं कि आखिर दिल्ली की सरकार ने ऐसा क्या किया कि कोरोना संक्रमण के मामलों में तेज गिरावट आ गई जबकि कुछ दिन पहले इसे देश का ‘सबसे बड़ा कोरोना हॉटस्पॉट’ कहा जा रहा था। इसे ‘दिल्ली मॉडल’ नाम दिया गया है। आइए जानते हैं कि आखिर क्या है ये ‘दिल्ली मॉडल’, जिसकी चर्चा अब देश ही नहीं बल्कि विदेशों में भी हो रही है। #Delhimodel #Coronavirus #Arvindkejriwal

entry.title: President Ramnath Kovind ने 9वीं कक्षा के रियाज़ को ‘ईदी’ में दी Racing Cycle वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: President Ramnath Kovind ने 9वीं कक्षा के रियाज़ को ‘ईदी’ में दी Racing Cycle वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Today, the festival of Eid-ul-Azha i.e. Bakrid is being celebrated all over the country. In the Jama Masjid in Delhi, people offered prayers on Saturday morning. Prayers were offered at Jama Masjid in Delhi at 6.5 am. At the same time, tell you that one day before Eid, President Ram Nath Kovind presented a bicycle as Idi to a student of IX.
देशभर में आज ईद-उल-अजहा यानी की बकरीद का त्योहार मनाया जा रहा है. दिल्ली स्थित जामा मस्जिद में लोगों ने शनिवार सुबह नमाज अदा की. दिल्ली की जामा मस्जिद में सुबह 6 बजकर 5 मिनट पर नमाज अदा की गई.वहीं आपको बता दें कि ईद से एक दिन पहले राष्ट्रपति रामनाथ कोविंद ने नौवीं के एक छात्र को ईदी के रुप में साइकिल भेंट की
#President #RamNathKovind #RacingBicycle #EidalAdha
entry.summary: Today, the festival of Eid-ul-Azha i.e. Bakrid is being celebrated all over the country. In the Jama Masjid in Delhi, people offered prayers on Saturday morning. Prayers were offered at Jama Masjid in Delhi at 6.5 am. At the same time, tell you that one day before Eid, President Ram Nath Kovind presented a bicycle as Idi to a student of IX. देशभर में आज ईद-उल-अजहा यानी की बकरीद का त्योहार मनाया जा रहा है. दिल्ली स्थित जामा मस्जिद में लोगों ने शनिवार सुबह नमाज अदा की. दिल्ली की जामा मस्जिद में सुबह 6 बजकर 5 मिनट पर नमाज अदा की गई.वहीं आपको बता दें कि ईद से एक दिन पहले राष्ट्रपति रामनाथ कोविंद ने नौवीं के एक छात्र को ईदी के रुप में साइकिल भेंट की #President #RamNathKovind #RacingBicycle #EidalAdha

entry.title: Asia Paraplegic in Everyday Life : Happy Paraplegic Girl Transferring 1

link.title: Asia Paraplegic in Everyday Life : Happy Paraplegic Girl Transferring 1

entry.content:
"Asia Paraplegic in Everyday Life" explored how persons with paraplegic perceived the experience of disability in their everyday lives. In this video series, disability was described as a multifaceted, complex experience that is integrated into the lives of persons with disabilities, how well they were able to integrate disability into their lives. Have you ever seen a disabled singer, model, artist or just a normal girl with a disability ? Now you see :)
Follow my channel for daily amazing video !!!
entry.summary: "Asia Paraplegic in Everyday Life" explored how persons with paraplegic perceived the experience of disability in their everyday lives. In this video series, disability was described as a multifaceted, complex experience that is integrated into the lives of persons with disabilities, how well they were able to integrate disability into their lives. Have you ever seen a disabled singer, model, artist or just a normal girl with a disability ? Now you see :) Follow my channel for daily amazing video !!!

entry.title: 110 Years of Alfa Romeo Tour - Beauty

link.title: 110 Years of Alfa Romeo Tour - Beauty

entry.content: To commemorate a milestone that very few automakers can match, Alfa Romeo today celebrates its 110th anniversary, reopening the doors to its historic museum in Arese, Italy, while following all current health and safety guidelines. The brand invites fans from around the world to see new sections of the museum, enjoy exclusive video content and join the celebration festivities online.
entry.summary: To commemorate a milestone that very few automakers can match, Alfa Romeo today celebrates its 110th anniversary, reopening the doors to its historic museum in Arese, Italy, while following all current health and safety guidelines. The brand invites fans from around the world to see new sections of the museum, enjoy exclusive video content and join the celebration festivities online.

entry.title: Before the Fall Movie (2015)

link.title: Before the Fall Movie (2015)

entry.content:
Before the Fall Movie (2015) Official Trailer - Vietnam War Film - Action Crime Thriller Movie - Plot Synopsis: Cambodia 1975. Phnom Penh is under siege at the end of the Vietnam War. Only the presence of the last remaining US troops, is keeping Khmer Rouge guerrilla forces, from overrunning the town’s fragile defenses. A stunning Vietnamese nightclub singer engages in a battle of wits and deception between her two lovers, in an effort to escape Cambodia and start a new life.
Cast: Ian Virgo, Antonis Greco, Nicolas Berthery, Pauline Cammal
Written & Directed By: Ian White
Digital Release Date: August 18, 2020
entry.summary: Before the Fall Movie (2015) Official Trailer - Vietnam War Film - Action Crime Thriller Movie - Plot Synopsis: Cambodia 1975. Phnom Penh is under siege at the end of the Vietnam War. Only the presence of the last remaining US troops, is keeping Khmer Rouge guerrilla forces, from overrunning the town’s fragile defenses. A stunning Vietnamese nightclub singer engages in a battle of wits and deception between her two lovers, in an effort to escape Cambodia and start a new life. Cast: Ian Virgo, Antonis Greco, Nicolas Berthery, Pauline Cammal Written & Directed By: Ian White Digital Release Date: August 18, 2020

entry.title: Kilalanin ang father-daughter dancing duo na kinagigiliwan ng netizens!

link.title: Kilalanin ang father-daughter dancing duo na kinagigiliwan ng netizens!

entry.content:
Sino ang mag-aakalang ang simpleng pagsasayaw habang nagwawalis ay kagigiliwan nang husto ng mga taong gumagamit ng internet?
Ganito ang nangyari sa video ni Fernando Capulong Jr. nang i-upload sa TikTok ng kanyang anak na si Nikki ang video ng kanyang pagsasayaw habang nagwawalis.
Marami agad ang humanga, natuwa, at nagkomento sa TikTok account ni Nikki kunsaan ito na-upload.
May mga humiling pa nga na mag-"collab" sila ng kanyang ama sa pagsasayaw.
Ang resulta– ang mas kinatuwaang father-daughter dancing duo na Jun & Nikki!
Sa kasalukuyan ay mayroon nang mahigit two thousand subscribers ang YouTube channel nilang mag-ama.
Hindi lang dance videos ang laman ng channel, kundi vlog entries nilang mag-ama.
Panoorin ang video para mapanood kung gaano kahusay magsayaw ang mag-amang ito, kung bakit magaling sumayaw si Mang Jun kahit sa edad nitong 53, at ano ang naidulot sa kanila ng pagiging sikat nila ngayon sa internet.
#junandnikkidancevideos #fatherdaughterdanceduo #OGFatherDaughterDancingDuo
Know the latest in showbiz on
Subscribe to our YouTube channel!
Follow us!
Instagram:
Facebook:
Twitter:
Visit our DailyMotion channel!
Join us on Viber:
entry.summary: Sino ang mag-aakalang ang simpleng pagsasayaw habang nagwawalis ay kagigiliwan nang husto ng mga taong gumagamit ng internet? Ganito ang nangyari sa video ni Fernando Capulong Jr. nang i-upload sa TikTok ng kanyang anak na si Nikki ang video ng kanyang pagsasayaw habang nagwawalis. Marami agad ang humanga, natuwa, at nagkomento sa TikTok account ni Nikki kunsaan ito na-upload. May mga humiling pa nga na mag-"collab" sila ng kanyang ama sa pagsasayaw. Ang resulta– ang mas kinatuwaang father-daughter dancing duo na Jun & Nikki! Sa kasalukuyan ay mayroon nang mahigit two thousand subscribers ang YouTube channel nilang mag-ama. Hindi lang dance videos ang laman ng channel, kundi vlog entries nilang mag-ama. Panoorin ang video para mapanood kung gaano kahusay magsayaw ang mag-amang ito, kung bakit magaling sumayaw si Mang Jun kahit sa edad nitong 53, at ano ang naidulot sa kanila ng pagiging sikat nila ngayon sa internet. #junandnikkidancevideos #fatherdaughterdanceduo #OGFatherDaughterDancingDuo Know the latest in showbiz on Subscribe to our YouTube channel! Follow us! Instagram: Facebook: Twitter: Visit our DailyMotion channel! Join us on Viber:

entry.title: Borja desea quedarse en la maquina pese a problemas con el club

link.title: Borja desea quedarse en la maquina pese a problemas con el club

entry.content: El paso de Jonathan Borja tiene como límite el mes de diciembre, no obstante, el veloz delantero sueña con extender su vínculo con la Máquina y espera una pronta respuesta por parte de la directiva celeste.
entry.summary: El paso de Jonathan Borja tiene como límite el mes de diciembre, no obstante, el veloz delantero sueña con extender su vínculo con la Máquina y espera una pronta respuesta por parte de la directiva celeste.

entry.title: Roccella Jonica Miss Mondo Italia sfilata in costume da bagno

link.title: Roccella Jonica Miss Mondo Italia sfilata in costume da bagno

entry.content: Selezione Miss Mondo Italia in Calabria a Roccella Joniaca per il titolo di semifinalista nazionale e finaliste interregionali
entry.summary: Selezione Miss Mondo Italia in Calabria a Roccella Joniaca per il titolo di semifinalista nazionale e finaliste interregionali

entry.title: Après une perte historique, Renault promet des « temps meilleurs »

link.title: Après une perte historique, Renault promet des « temps meilleurs »

entry.content: On les attendait catastrophiques : ils le sont. Touché de plein fouet par la pandémie du Covid-19 et la mauvaise santé de Nissan, Renault a affiché au premier semestre la perte nette la plus importante de son histoire : 7,3 milliards d’euros ! Elle représente un peu moins de la moitié du chiffre d’affaires du groupe, qui, lui, a baissé, comme la moyenne du secteur automobile, de 34 %, à 18,4 milliards d’euros.
entry.summary: On les attendait catastrophiques : ils le sont. Touché de plein fouet par la pandémie du Covid-19 et la mauvaise santé de Nissan, Renault a affiché au premier semestre la perte nette la plus importante de son histoire : 7,3 milliards d’euros ! Elle représente un peu moins de la moitié du chiffre d’affaires du groupe, qui, lui, a baissé, comme la moyenne du secteur automobile, de 34 %, à 18,4 milliards d’euros.

entry.title: États-Unis : Barack Obama s’attaque à Donald Trump

link.title: États-Unis : Barack Obama s’attaque à Donald Trump

entry.content:
Lors des funérailles de John Lewis, figure de la lutte pour les droits de la communauté noire aux États-Unis, Barack Obama a vivement critiqué les récentes déclarations de Donald Trump sur un potentiel report de l’élection présidentielle américaine.
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :

entry.title: Unlock 3.0: விரைவில் திறக்கப்படும் தியேட்டர்கள், மால்கள்

link.title: Unlock 3.0: விரைவில் திறக்கப்படும் தியேட்டர்கள், மால்கள்

entry.content:
இந்தியாவில் அன்லாக் 3.0ல் தியேட்டர்கள் மற்றும் மால்களை திறக்க அதிக வாய்ப்புள்ளது என்று தகவல்கள் வருகிறது.
Cinemas, likely to open in unlock 3.0
entry.summary: இந்தியாவில் அன்லாக் 3.0ல் தியேட்டர்கள் மற்றும் மால்களை திறக்க அதிக வாய்ப்புள்ளது என்று தகவல்கள் வருகிறது. Cinemas, likely to open in unlock 3.0

entry.title: The Star Owls podcast August 1 - Talking Wednesday’s 12 point penalty

link.title: The Star Owls podcast August 1 - Talking Wednesday’s 12 point penalty

entry.content: Eight months after the charge was filed, three months after the season should have finished, nine days after it did - Sheffield Wednesday finally have the verdict from their EFL charge for breaching financial regulations. And after a 12 point deduction was implemented for next season, we pressed the emergency podcast button to deliver a special episode of The Star Owls. Liam Hoden is joined by The Star’s Wednesday writers Alex Miller and Joe Crann to get their heads around what we know so far about the decision and what it means for the future of the club.
entry.summary: Eight months after the charge was filed, three months after the season should have finished, nine days after it did - Sheffield Wednesday finally have the verdict from their EFL charge for breaching financial regulations. And after a 12 point deduction was implemented for next season, we pressed the emergency podcast button to deliver a special episode of The Star Owls. Liam Hoden is joined by The Star’s Wednesday writers Alex Miller and Joe Crann to get their heads around what we know so far about the decision and what it means for the future of the club.

entry.title: Md Shami’s wife Hasin Jahan shares hilarious Dance Video on Nora Fatehi’s Song वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Md Shami’s wife Hasin Jahan shares hilarious Dance Video on Nora Fatehi’s Song वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Mohammad Shami’s wife Hasin Jahan shares hilarious Dance Video on Govinda’s Song. Hasin Jahan wife of Indian team fast bowler Mohammad Shami is very active on social media. She often shares her photos and dance videos with fans on social media. Now once again Haseen Jahan has shared a latest Video of himself on his Instagram account.
भारतीय टीम के तेज गेंदबाज मोहम्मद शमी जहां सोशल मीडिया पर अपनी फिटनेस और प्रैक्टिस को लेकर सुर्खियां बटोर रहे हैं तो वहीं उनकी पत्नी जो अब उनसे अलग रह रही हैं वो सोशल मीडिया पर अपनी फोटो को लेकर चर्चा में बनी हुई हैं। मोहम्मद शमी यहां अपने फार्म हाउस पर जमकर पसीना बहा रहे हैं। वहीं, विवाद के चलते उनसे अलग रह रहीं उनकी पत्नी हसीन जहां भी पीछे नहीं हैं।
#MohammadShami #HasinJahan #HasinJahanDance
entry.summary: Mohammad Shami’s wife Hasin Jahan shares hilarious Dance Video on Govinda’s Song. Hasin Jahan wife of Indian team fast bowler Mohammad Shami is very active on social media. She often shares her photos and dance videos with fans on social media. Now once again Haseen Jahan has shared a latest Video of himself on his Instagram account. भारतीय टीम के तेज गेंदबाज मोहम्मद शमी जहां सोशल मीडिया पर अपनी फिटनेस और प्रैक्टिस को लेकर सुर्खियां बटोर रहे हैं तो वहीं उनकी पत्नी जो अब उनसे अलग रह रही हैं वो सोशल मीडिया पर अपनी फोटो को लेकर चर्चा में बनी हुई हैं। मोहम्मद शमी यहां अपने फार्म हाउस पर जमकर पसीना बहा रहे हैं। वहीं, विवाद के चलते उनसे अलग रह रहीं उनकी पत्नी हसीन जहां भी पीछे नहीं हैं। #MohammadShami #HasinJahan #HasinJahanDance

entry.title: Lil Gotit - Digital FADER FORT 2

link.title: Lil Gotit - Digital FADER FORT 2

entry.content: Lil Gotit’s had quite the year already, dropping not one but two new projects — Superstar Creature, and most recently, Hood Baby 2. He’s got a lot to flex, and that’s just what he does on his digital FORT set. Watch above for raucous backyard performances of his new songs "Bricks In The Attic" and "Never Legit," as well as "Da Real Hoodbabies," because we love a classic. Then, head over here to read our Gen F on the rising Atlanta rapper.
entry.summary: Lil Gotit’s had quite the year already, dropping not one but two new projects — Superstar Creature, and most recently, Hood Baby 2. He’s got a lot to flex, and that’s just what he does on his digital FORT set. Watch above for raucous backyard performances of his new songs "Bricks In The Attic" and "Never Legit," as well as "Da Real Hoodbabies," because we love a classic. Then, head over here to read our Gen F on the rising Atlanta rapper.

entry.title: Raksha Bandhan 2020 : Rajasthan के Bundi में महिलाओं पेड़ों को बांधी राखी वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Raksha Bandhan 2020 : Rajasthan के Bundi में महिलाओं पेड़ों को बांधी राखी वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
A positive initiative has been initiated on this Raksha Bandhan in Bundi district of Rajasthan. Women have tied a rakhi to the trees giving the message of saving the environment. The women tied rakhi to the trees in the traditional way, tilak them and vowed to protect them. It is being told that its initiative has been taken by an organization.
राजस्थान के बूंदी जिले में इस रक्षाबंधन पर एक सकारात्मक पहल शुरू की है. महिलाओं ने पर्यावरण बचाओ का संदेश देते हुए पेड़ों को राखी बांधी है. महिलाओं ने पूरे पारंपरिक तरीके से पेड़ों को राखी बांधी, उनका तिलक किया और उनकी सुरक्षा का प्रण लिया. बताया जा रहा है कि एक संगठन की ओर से इसकी पहल की गई है.
#RakshaBandhan2020 #Rajasthan #BundiWomentiedRakhiTree
entry.summary: A positive initiative has been initiated on this Raksha Bandhan in Bundi district of Rajasthan. Women have tied a rakhi to the trees giving the message of saving the environment. The women tied rakhi to the trees in the traditional way, tilak them and vowed to protect them. It is being told that its initiative has been taken by an organization. राजस्थान के बूंदी जिले में इस रक्षाबंधन पर एक सकारात्मक पहल शुरू की है. महिलाओं ने पर्यावरण बचाओ का संदेश देते हुए पेड़ों को राखी बांधी है. महिलाओं ने पूरे पारंपरिक तरीके से पेड़ों को राखी बांधी, उनका तिलक किया और उनकी सुरक्षा का प्रण लिया. बताया जा रहा है कि एक संगठन की ओर से इसकी पहल की गई है. #RakshaBandhan2020 #Rajasthan #BundiWomentiedRakhiTree

entry.title: Covid-19 : Seize millions de cas dans le monde, un premier cas ‘suspecté’ en Corée du Nord

link.title: Covid-19 : Seize millions de cas dans le monde, un premier cas ‘suspecté’ en Corée du Nord

entry.content: Le rythme de la pandémie continue de s’accélérer dans le monde, avec plus de cinq millions de nouveaux cas détectés depuis le 1er juillet, soit plus d’un tiers des cas de Covid-19 déclarés depuis le début de la pandémie.View on euronews
entry.summary: Le rythme de la pandémie continue de s’accélérer dans le monde, avec plus de cinq millions de nouveaux cas détectés depuis le 1er juillet, soit plus d’un tiers des cas de Covid-19 déclarés depuis le début de la pandémie.View on euronews
